title: CostSummary
description: Aggregate cost summary across all resources provisioned by an agent at a provider, returned by GET /osp/v1/cost-summary (Section 6.18)

total_cost.description: Aggregate cost across all resources for the reporting period

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code or stablecoin identifier (e.g., 'USD', 'EUR', 'USDC')

period.description: Reporting period with start and end timestamps

resources.description: Per-resource cost breakdown for all resources provisioned by the agent

projected_monthly.description: Projected total cost if current usage continues for a full calendar month, extrapolated from the current period's burn rate

start.description: Start of the reporting period (ISO 8601, inclusive)

end.description: End of the reporting period (ISO 8601, exclusive)

ResourceCost.description: Cost breakdown for a single provisioned resource

offering_id.description: The service offering this resource belongs to

tier_id.description: The tier the resource is on during this period

cost.description: Total cost for this resource during the period

breakdown.description: Per-dimension cost breakdown for this resource

CostLineItem.description: A single cost line item within a resource's breakdown

amount.description: Cost amount for this dimension (negative values represent credits or adjustments)
